label: Psychic ritual -- void provocation
description: Ritual that provokes a psychic shock from the void. The invoker risks a dark psychic shock and may trigger an incident.

psychicShockChanceFromQualityCurve.label: Psychic shock chance from quality curve
psychicShockChanceFromQualityCurve.description: Curve mapping ritual quality to the chance that the invoker suffers a psychic shock.

darkPsychicShockDurarionHoursRange.label: Dark psychic shock duration hours range
darkPsychicShockDurarionHoursRange.description: Random duration in hours for the dark psychic shock applied to the invoker.

incidentDelayHoursRange.label: Incident delay hours range
incidentDelayHoursRange.description: Random delay in hours before the void provocation incident fires.
